name: practice
title: Practice
description: A calm theme for a medical or dental clinic: soft clinical white, one blue-green accent, oversized legible type and big tap targets for anxious visitors in a hurry. The signature is the quiet hours/phone/emergency strip under the masthead — presence, not pursuit.

tokens.--font-body: all text (system sans — calm and instantly legible)
tokens.--text-l: the strip phone number, ledes, card titles
tokens.--leading-body: body line height (roomy, for tired eyes)
tokens.--color-panel: the strip, cards, and quiet boxes
tokens.--color-accent-deep: link hover and headings inside tinted boxes
tokens.--color-on-accent: text placed on the accent color
tokens.--color-emergency: the emergency phone link — the only third color
tokens.--measure: maximum text column width (kept short for easy reading)
tokens.--radius: corner rounding for boxes and buttons
tokens.--tap-target: minimum touch height for buttons and links
